chunks.content: The Scottish Premiership is the top level of the Scottish football league system, contested by twelve teams. The league was established in 2013 as part of a restructuring of Scottish football.
chunks.content_original: The Scottish Premiership is the top level of the Scottish football league system, contested by twelve teams. The league was established in 2013 as part of a restructuring of Scottish football.

chunks.content: The league operates on a system of promotion and relegation with the Scottish Championship, the second tier of Scottish football. The bottom-placed team in the Premiership is relegated automatically, while the second-bottom team enters a play-off with the teams finishing second, third and fourth in the Championship.
chunks.content_original: The league operates on a system of promotion and relegation with the Scottish Championship, the second tier of Scottish football. The bottom-placed team in the Premiership is relegated automatically, while the second-bottom team enters a play-off with the teams finishing second, third and fourth in the Championship.

chunks.content: The Scottish Premiership is one of the top leagues in Europe and attracts a significant amount of media attention. The league is broadcast in over 100 countries worldwide.
chunks.content_original: The Scottish Premiership is one of the top leagues in Europe and attracts a significant amount of media attention. The league is broadcast in over 100 countries worldwide.

chunks.content: The current champions are Celtic, who have won the title a record 54 times. Rangers are the second most successful club in the league's history, with 55 titles.
chunks.content_original: The current champions are Celtic, who have won the title a record 54 times. Rangers are the second most successful club in the league's history, with 55 titles.

chunks.content: The Scottish Premiership is a highly competitive league, with a number of clubs vying for the title each season. The league is also known for its passionate fan bases and its exciting, fast-paced football.
chunks.content_original: The Scottish Premiership is a highly competitive league, with a number of clubs vying for the title each season. The league is also known for its passionate fan bases and its exciting, fast-paced football.
